# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: example-svc
spec:
  port: 80
  protocol: http
  path: /v1
  host: service-host # optional, but useful for cloud DNS
  target:
    url: http://service-ip
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Route
metadata:
  name: example-route
spec:
  hosts: 
    - service-host
  paths:  
    - /v1
    - /v2 # optional, could also be just "v2" (with wildcard)
    - /api/* 
  service:
    name: example-svc
    port: 80 # default is 80
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: second-service # the service name for the target (e.g., "upstream-host")
spec:
  port: 9000 # optional,  default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional,  default is ""
  host: "upstream-host" # required to be non-empty and unique across all services
  target:
    url: http://second-service-ip
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata: 
  name: third-service # the service name for the target (e.g., "upstream-host") 
spec:
  port: 9000 # optional,  default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional,  default is ""
  host: "upstream-host" # required to be non-empty and unique across all services
  target:
    url: http://third-service-ip
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata: 
  name: first-service # the service name for the target (e.g., "upstream-host") 
spec:
  port: 9000 # optional,  default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional,  default is ""
  host: "upstream-host" # required to be non-empty and unique across all services
  target:
    url: http://first-service-ip
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata: 
  name: upstream-host
spec:
  port: 80 # optional, default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional, default is ""
  target:
    target_group:
      services: 
        - service: second-service
          weight: 2
        - service: third-service 
          weight: 3
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata: 
  name: upstream-host
spec:
  port: 80 # optional, default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional, default is ""
  target:
    target_group:
      services: 
        - service: first-service 
          weight: 1
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata: 
  name: upstream-host
spec:
  port: 80 # optional, default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional, default is ""
  target:
    target_group:
      services: 
        - service: third-service 
          weight: 1
        - service: first-service
          weight: 3
---
apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Service
metadata: 
  name: upstream-host # the service name for the target (e.g., "upstream-host")
spec:
  port: 80 # optional, default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional, default is ""
  target:
    target_group:
      services: 
        - service: first-service
          weight: 3
        - service: third-service 
          weight: 2
        - service: second-service
---

metadata: 
  name: upstream-host # the service name for the target (e.g., "upstream-host")
spec:
  port: 80 # optional, default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional, default is ""
  target:
    target_group:
      services: 
        - service: third-service
          weight: 1
        - service: first-service 
          weight: 2
---

  name: upstream-host # the service name for the target (e.g., "upstream-host")

  port: 80 # optional, default is 80
  protocol: http 
  path: /path/in/upstream-host # optional, default is ""
